query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "count: i64" FROM blocks b
               WHERE b.block_type = 'page'
                 AND b.content = ?
                 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
                 AND EXISTS (
                     SELECT 1 FROM block_properties bp
                     WHERE bp.block_id = b.id
                       AND bp.key = 'space'
                       AND bp.value_ref = ?
                 )
